---
title: "Generative AI Tools for Active Learning in Biology"
date: 2025-04-12
categories: [AI, Active Learning, Biology Education]
---

[Pearson Biology Learning Conference 2025](https://www.pearson.com)

---

**Reuther, K.** (2025). *Generative AI Tools for Active Learning in Biology*. Pearson Biology Learning Conference (BLC). April 11–13, 2025.

Presentation on designing and deploying generative AI tools to support active learning in undergraduate biology courses, with a focus on practical frameworks instructors can adapt for their own classrooms.
